dimension.description: Smallest unit in the baseline grid

small.description: Use this for subtle and small components that don’t require to group complex information like Status Indicators, Checkboxes and Color Swatches.

medium.description: Use this for form components presenting text information or inputs: Text Inputs and Text Area, Dropdowns, Menus and Banners.

large.description: Use this for all the containers and popups: All Cards, Modals, Tooltips and Toasts.
